name: Hello World
description: The built-in sample plugin for Reindeer Chopper. It greets the user and demonstrates common parameter types.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.label: Output Mode
parameters.description: Choose between repeated greeting and self-introduction output.

parameters.name: note
parameters.label: Extra Note
parameters.default: This is a three-line textarea example.
parameters.description: Optional multi-line text passed as one CLI value.

parameters.name: inputFile
parameters.label: Sample Input File
parameters.description: Pick a file to demo filepath(file).

parameters.name: outputDir
parameters.label: Sample Output Directory
parameters.description: Pick a directory to demo filepath(directory).
